items.name_en: 🇨🇳🇮🇹🇫🇷CHANEL 26C Early Spring Series, full of luxury ✨ Hobo Hippie Bag 👜 AS5970 Small Metal. The surface has a delicate short velvet feel, soft and skin-friendly. Vintage gold metal chain, . Paired with a matching cowhide handle, it ensures durability and creates a textural contrast, adding layers and refinement. It adds a highlight to a simple bag. The soft but structured silhouette holds its shape and elevates the style. It is effortless chic, practical, durable, and spacious. The look is very high-end. Dimensions: 23.5×31×10cm

items.name_en: Chanel ⚠️ 25K Champagne Gold AS1786 Best-selling Gold Ball CF Mini Flap. Compared to the previous vintage gold ball, this one is brighter and shinier. The chain has an extra small gold ball. Not only retro and beautiful, but also adjustable in length. Can be worn as a waist bag or crossbody. Too exquisite and perfect 💕 Love it so much 🥰🥰 Sold out globally 🤩🤩 Dimensions: 18cm

items.name_en: In stock 25k Hobo Bag
items.name_cn:
In stock 25k Hobo Bag
Full of high-end vibes! Redefining the perfect balance of casual and luxury with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship. Eclectic elegance~ Calfskin is soft and delicate; incredibly soft to the touch~
Open drawstring paired with double C buckle and 25bag design!!️ Very eye-catching, the perfect companion from casual to elegant ✨29*18*12*cm99522
